---
name: Feature request
about: New variant axis, continuation command, or capability.
title: "[FEATURE] <one-line summary>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What

Describe the feature.

## Why

Why is this load-bearing for the genre? What does it unlock?

## How

Sketch the change to `META-PROMPT.md`, `agents/04-prompt-architect.md`, or `templates/MASTER-PROMPT-TEMPLATE.md`:

```diff
+ <added section>
- <removed section>
```

## Validation plan

How would you test this? (e.g. "5 regen runs comparing old vs. new prompt on the same INPUT").

## Non-goals

What's explicitly out of scope for this feature.
